mapper.select:
SELECT ID, USER_ID, ACC_NO, USER_NAME, POST, DEPT, COMPANY_NAME, LOGIN_TIME, LOGIN_IP, CHANNEL_TYPE, UQ_MARK, OS, BROWSER, LOCATION, STATUS, ERROR_MSG FROM SYS_LOGIN_LOG
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYS_LOGIN_LOG( ID, USER_ID, ACC_NO, USER_NAME, POST, DEPT, COMPANY_NAME, LOGIN_TIME, LOGIN_IP, CHANNEL_TYPE, UQ_MARK, OS, BROWSER, LOCATION, STATUS, ERROR_MSG )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{post, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dept, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{channelType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uqMark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{os, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{browser, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{location, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorMsg, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
